test_suite.description: damped_wave is the correct array: exp(-0.2*t) * sin(3*t)
test_suite.hint_wrong_size: damped_wave should have shape (100,) -- one value per time point in t.
test_suite.hint_tolerance: Check your formula: damped_wave = exp(-0.2 * t) * sin(3 * t).

test_suite.description: make_damped_wave_plot() produces the correct labelled, titled plot with legend
test_suite.hint_not_defined: Define a function called make_damped_wave_plot() that returns a matplotlib Axes.
test_suite.hint_wrong_type: make_damped_wave_plot should return a matplotlib Axes (or Figure).
test_suite.hint_wrong_size: Check that you plot exactly one line, with one label in the legend, over 100 time points.
test_suite.hint_tolerance: Check your axis labels ('time (s)', 'amplitude'), title ('Damped Sine Wave'), legend label ('damped wave'), and the plotted data itself.
